forgotPassword.title: Forgot password

verifyEmail.title: Verify your email
verifyEmail.subtitle: We have sent an account activation email
verifyEmail.sentDescription: Please check your inbox (and spam folder) to activate your account.
verifyEmail.sentDescriptionWithEmail: Please check {{email}} (and spam folder) to activate your account.
verifyEmail.backToLogin: I have verified, back to login
verifyEmail.tip: After clicking the activation link in email, you can sign in immediately.

confirmEmail.title: Activate account
confirmEmail.subtitle: Verifying your email activation link
confirmEmail.successDescription: Your email is verified. You can now sign in.
confirmEmail.failed: Verification link is invalid or expired.
confirmEmail.missingToken: Missing verification token in the URL.
